current_html:
§ 2701.1 Adoption of 2 CFR Part 200.

(a) Under the authority listed above, the U.S. Small Business Administration adopts the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) Guidance in 2 CFR part 200, except for 2 CFR 200.74, 200.92, and 200.93. Thus, this part gives regulatory effect to the OMB guidance and supplements the guidance as needed for the Administration.
proposed_html:
§ 2701.1
Adoption of 2 CFR part 200.

The U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) adopts the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) regulation in 2 CFR part 200, with the additions and exceptions included in this part. This part gives regulatory effect to the OMB regulation for Federal awards issued by the Small Business Administration. See 2 CFR 200.110(a) regarding the process for amending 2 CFR part 200.
